title: BrightCore
description: Bright Core removes all in-game darkness, giving you full brightness and clear visibility for better exploration and PvP experience.
body:
# **BrightCore**

**BrightCore** is a lightweight texture pack designed to remove all forms of darkness in Minecraft. Whether you’re exploring deep caves, playing at night, or mining underground, this pack ensures everything remains fully visible — no torches required!

By adjusting Minecraft’s lighting textures, Full Bright delivers a clean, clear, and vibrant look without affecting performance or colors. It’s completely client-side, so it won’t change gameplay or give any unfair advantage in servers that allow visual packs.

## **Features**:

● 100% brightness everywhere — day or night

● Great for mining and exploring caves

● FPS-friendly and compatible with most mods

 Works smoothly with Sodium, Iris, and OptiFine alternatives

__________________________________________________________

 ### **Note**:
This pack requires Polytone to function correctly. Make sure Polytone is installed for the best experience.

Experience Minecraft without shadows or darkness — with Full Bright, the world is always clear and colorful.
 
### **Disclaimer**:
 
  This texture pack is a mixture of multiple sources and community packs, combined and optimized to create a single cohesive Full Bright experience. Full credit goes to the original creators for their textures and concepts.
